steps.t: The slave Kurtil is lying on the southern edge of the Udûn basin, up atop a wooden structure. You should help Kurtil up off the ground.
The slave Kurtil stands on the southern edge of the Udûn basin, up atop a wooden structure. You should talk to Kurtil some more.
You should search for more signal flags south of the Udûn basin, on the road that leads up toward Mornaur.
Now that you have inspected more signal flags, you should look for Kurtil southward on the road that leads to Mornaur.
